title: Windows Security or System Event Log Cleared
description: Detects native Windows event log clearing through Security Event ID 1102 and System Event ID 104.
query: (('Log Source' = 'Windows Security Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Event Security Logs') and 'Event ID' = '1102') or ('Log Source' = 'Windows Event System Logs' and 'Event ID' = '104') | stats count as ClearEvents by User, 'Host Name (Server)', Entity | sort -ClearEvents
falsepositives: Approved incident-response evidence collection or test system resets

references.name: Microsoft Learn: 1102(S) The audit log was cleared
